note: Hybrid realism: PDF layout and prospectus taxonomy (booth fee, deposit, package, cancellation, schedule) mirror real exhibitor-prospectus conventions from trade shows such as ACVO, CDA, and state charter-school industry expos. Specific dollar amounts, dates, and package bullets are synthesized because real-world prospectuses typically live behind exhibitor-portal logins or email-gated landing pages and are not stable public URLs. All three fixtures are single-page PDFs that exercise the pdf-extract + side-by-side comparison skill set.

entries.description: Synthesized exhibitor prospectus modeled on ACVO annual scientific meeting conventions (single booth size, modest deposit, stepped refund).
Synthesized exhibitor prospectus modeled on CDA Anaheim trade show conventions (multi-day hall, stepped cancellation schedule).
Synthesized exhibitor prospectus modeled on a Texas charter-school industry expo (co-located with state conference, single cancellation cutoff).
Synthesized but realistic internal ROI assumptions for qualified leads, close rates, gross margin, and travel cost, used to turn the prospectus comparison into a business recommendation.
